description: Extract guaranteed schema-valid JSON from text/HTML. Pay-per-call via x402 (USDC on Base).
name: io.github.noamjose/schemasure

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of SchemaSure. Without a wallet key the client uses the free V1 evaluation endpoint; with a wallet key it pays per call on /v2/extract.
environmentVariables.name: SCHEMASURE_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional 0x-prefixed EVM key. If set, enables paid x402 V2 mode: the client signs USDC payments (Base mainnet) locally and calls /v2/extract. Never sent to SchemaSure.
environmentVariables.name: SCHEMASURE_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Client-side spend cap in USD per call (paid mode). The client refuses to pay more than this, even if the server advertises a higher price.
environmentVariables.name: SCHEMASURE_MAX_PRICE_USD

title: SchemaSure — structured extraction
